case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JUAN ANTONIO CASTILLO FRANCO

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-18-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, JUAN ANTONIO CASTILLO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $608.09 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, JUAN ANTONIO CASTILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-14-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506; PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT; PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE PROOF OF COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 6.6(C) REGARDING SUBSTITUDED SERVICE, FOR DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENTS.
